title: Paris 'punishingly hot' as Western Europe hit by heatwave
summary_full: Hugh Schofield reports from Paris as a heat dome settled over Western Europe bringing temperatures above the average for May.
summary_public: Hugh Schofield reports from Paris as a heat dome settled over Western Europe bringing temperatures above the average for May.
